name: comfyui-model-gallery
description: Touch-first card-grid model picker for ComfyUI's folder-backed combos. TypeScript source in src/, built to web/dist/ via bun build. Consumes @laurigates/comfy-modal-kit. See ADR-0001.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/model-gallery.ts --target browser --format esm --banner '/* web/dist bundle built by bun from src/ in this repository (see package.json). Inlines @laurigates/comfy-modal-kit (MIT) - a first-party library by the same publisher, published to npm with provenance attestation: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@laurigates/comfy-modal-kit */' --outdir web/dist --external '/scripts/*' && rm -rf web/dist/data && cp -R web/data web/dist/data
